summary: On the Pokrovsk direction, the 46th Brigade destroyed enemy forces, drones, vehicles, communication equipment, and electronic warfare systems, with UAV operators demonstrating high skill in halting enemy actions. Ukrainian forces are employing fiber-optic FPV drones with 50 km control range, making them immune to jamming and capable of deep strikes on Russian rear areas, while also shifting to non-standard control frequencies to evade detection. Russian logistics are reportedly collapsing under systematic Ukrainian drone attacks targeting supply lines and rear infrastructure, causing widespread panic in Russian military channels. Additionally, Ukrainian FPV pilots are adapting tactics to counter Russian defenses, including attempts to dismount enemy personnel before strikes, while Russian forces are testing new anti-drone systems like "Yolka" and "Rubikon" to counter the drone threat.
